item.title: Genpact Transaction Monitoring Analyst
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: Genpact Transaction Monitoring Analyst coordinates AI agents to assess customer behavior, analyze transactions, validate profiles, review prior alerts, and recommend next steps; analysts retain final decision authority and the system does not take regulated action without human approval.
updates.after_state: "AI-agent coordinated first-level AML investigation workflow with human-in-the-loop and audit trail"

evidence.source_quote: Genpact Transaction Monitoring Analyst coordinates AI agents to assess customer behavior, analyze transactions, validate profiles, review prior alerts, and recommend next steps. Analysts make the final decisions; the system does not take regulated action without human approval.

facts.statement: Genpact Transaction Monitoring Analyst coordinates AI agents to assess customer behavior, analyze transactions, validate profiles, review prior alerts, and recommend next steps; analysts retain final decision authority and the system does not take regulated action without human approval.
facts.value: AI-agent coordinated first-level AML investigation workflow with human-in-the-loop and audit trail

item.html:
Genpact Transaction Monitoring Analyst coordinates AI agents to assess customer behavior, analyze transactions, validate profiles, review prior alerts, and recommend next steps; analysts retain final decision authority and the system does not take regulated action without human approval.

变化方向：NEW_FACTOR · 重要性：50

原状态：此前未记录

新状态："AI-agent coordinated first-level AML investigation workflow with human-in-the-loop and audit trail"
